<TextView android:id="@+id/digit_m2_5" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="0dp" android:text="5" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@color/flip_digit_text" android:textSize="52sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:includeFontPadding="false" />

<TextView android:id="@+id/digit_m2_6" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="0dp" android:text="6" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@color/flip_digit_text" android:textSize="52sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:includeFontPadding="false" />

<TextView android:id="@+id/digit_m2_7" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="0dp" android:text="7" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@color/flip_digit_text" android:textSize="52sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:includeFontPadding="false" />

<TextView android:id="@+id/digit_m2_8" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="0dp" android:text="8" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@color/flip_digit_text" android:textSize="52sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:includeFontPadding="false" />

<TextView android:id="@+id/digit_m2_9" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="0dp" android:text="9" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@color/flip_digit_text" android:textSize="52sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="monospace" android:includeFontPadding="false" />
